full_text:
Ji Huang 吉黃
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Huang (吉黃)was born in Zuopingyi. Used to serve Zhao Wen, when his master died, he left his post to attend funeral. Executed for it. Ji Huang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Ji Huang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
